name: query_api_get_fields
description: Discover canonical Query API fields, field descriptions, filter support, value lists, warnings, and dynamic field builders. Call this before building a query.

name: query_api_run
description: Run a Query API request and return JSONL events. Use only canonical field names from query_api_get_fields. For previews, pass small limit and max_rows values.

name.description: Human-readable query name, or null when no stable name is needed.

display_fields.description: Canonical fields to display, in output order.

filters.description: Backend filters to apply before streaming results.

field.description: Canonical field name returned by query_api_get_fields.

limit.description: Optional preview limit. Use null for full runs.

max_rows.description: Optional maximum rows hint. Use null for full runs.

name: query_api_get_status
description: Read status for running and recently completed queries.

name: query_api_cancel
description: Cancel a running query by query_id. Ask the user for confirmation before calling this tool.

query_id.description: Query ID returned by a run or status response.

name: query_api_get_results
description: Load saved results for a completed query as JSONL events.

name: query_api_list_templates
description: List saved query templates when the backend supports template actions.
